hooks.if: Bash(pnpm install*)|Bash(pnpm i *)|Bash(pnpm add*)|Bash(pnpm remove*)|Bash(pnpm update*)|Bash(pnpm up*)|Bash(pnpm fetch*)|Bash(npm install*)|Bash(npm add*)|Bash(npm update*)
hooks.prompt: Use the socket-firewall skill and prepend `sfw` to this command.

hooks.command: pnpm -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" check && pnpm -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" exec tsgo --noEmit && pnpm -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" test

hooks.prompt: git push completed. Run `gh run list --limit 1` to check CI status and report the result.
package.json was modified. Check for dependency or script changes.
styles.css was modified. This may affect Tailwind token definitions. Review the changes.
Build or test config was modified. Verify that dev server, build, and tests still work correctly.
tsconfig.json was modified. Check for path alias, compiler option, or include/exclude changes that may affect builds and IDE behavior.
oxlint.json was modified. Review rule changes and verify lint still passes.
